item.title: Crown Letter: Mahon
item.description:
ðŸ‘‘ CROWN LETTER: CATHIE MAHON

Treasury Mentor, Lady Banyan of the Vault

First Keeper of the Member Service Account (MSA)

Board Candidate, Liana Banyan Corporation

Dear Ms. Mahon,

You’ve spent your career building financial infrastructure for people the system forgot.

I’m building a platform to make sure they’re never forgotten again.

Inclusiv represents over 500 community development credit unions serving 20 million people in low-income and underserved communities. You’ve proven that cooperative finance works â€” that when people pool their resources and govern themselves, everyone benefits.
